steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The Dial is explored in depth while Voices remains about which relatively little is known — opposing conditions requiring a contrast transition.

steps.title: Match the transition
steps.content: “Though” signals contrast, showing that despite one situation, an opposite one applies. The other choices (likewise, moreover, for instance) suggest similarity or addition, contradicting this opposition. That matches choice C — C is correct.
